item.description:
## whispermax v0.1.0
i wanted a fast local dictation app i could trust, so i built whispermax.
- fully local dictation with whisper large v3 turbo - compact floating recorder ui - fast global hotkey workflow - direct insertion across many native apps and browser text boxes - honest fallback to copied to clipboard when insertion can’t be trusted - searchable transcript history - dictionary for custom names, products, and phrases - simple onboarding for model, permissions, and hotkey setup
notes: - this release is local-first and built around one model - the app is currently not notarized, so macos may ask you to open it manually the first time
